rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Fam. Code §2.014, which governs the family trust fund funded by marriage license fees and administered by the attorney general.
quote: The family trust fund is created as a trust fund with the state comptroller and shall be administered by the attorney general for the beneficiaries of the fund.
_note: No overlap between proposed change and this statute.
